title: Redactica
subtitle: Read censored Wikipedia excerpts and guess the country
error: Error loading puzzle. Please try again.
come_back: Come back tomorrow for a new country!
switch_lang_body: Switching to {lang} costs 1 hint, and your unlocked clues will NOT carry over: you'll start from the first paragraph again. Continue?
switch_lang_blocked: You have no hint unlocks left, so you can't change language until today's game is over.
htp_intro: Redactica is a daily puzzle: every player gets the same secret country, guessed from a censored excerpt of its Wikipedia article. A new country is chosen every day.
htp_goal_body: All country names, capitals, neighboring countries, demonyms, languages, currencies and other geographic giveaways are blacked out (███). Read what's left and figure out the country.
htp_goal_note: The width of each black-out is scrambled by a couple of characters, so you can't count letters to guess the hidden word — don't trust the block size!
htp_guesses_body: You start with 1 censored paragraph and have 5 guesses to name the country. Stuck? Unlock up to 3 extra paragraphs as hints — each one you use lowers your maximum possible score.
htp_score_penalty: Each wrong guess costs 10 points (minimum 10 points on a win).
htp_score_loss: Run out of guesses without winning and you score 0.
htp_language_body: Play in English, Català or Español. Switching mid-game costs 1 hint unlock, and you restart from paragraph 1 in the new language — no free peeking. Switching is free once the game is over.
htp_after_body: Win or lose, the full uncensored Wikipedia article is revealed so you can read about the country. Share your result — guesses, hints, score and streak — with friends.
htp_streak_body: Come back every day to keep your streak alive. Your stats are saved in this browser, so they're tied to this device.
htp_easy_body: Turn on Easy Mode to open a world map with three buttons — Consider, Discard, Unmark. Pick one, then click any number of countries to mark them that way — a scratchpad, not an auto-guess. It costs half your score and resets every day, so you choose whether to use it each time you play. You still submit your guess the normal way, by typing it in.
easy_mode_body: Easy Mode opens a world map to mark countries as you think through the clue, but it halves your score for today and can't be turned back off until tomorrow. Continue in Easy Mode, or stay in Hard Mode?
easy_mode_active: Easy Mode is on for today — score halved
map_instructions: Pick a mode below, then click any country to mark it. This is just for your own notes — you still submit your guess in the box below.
join_leaderboard: Log in or register to save your score
username_taken: That username is already taken. Try another one.
weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
leaderboard_empty: No scores yet — be the first!
